title: Newborn Town targets global viewers with AI-made short dramas

title: Global Market Today: Asian shares rise as chipmakers gain, oil climbs
description: Asian shares advanced as regional chipmakers gained on artificial intelligence buildout expectations. Oil extended its rally after Houthi militants targeted Saudi Arabian tankers in the Red Sea. Alphabet Inc. raised its capital spending significantly, impacting US equity futures negatively. Investors are scrutinizing megacap earnings for AI return on investment signs. Geopolitical tensions and rising energy prices complicate the Federal Reserve's policy outlook.
content:
Asian shares advanced as regional chipmakers gained on expectations they will benefit from the billions spent on the artificial intelligence buildout. Oil extended its rally.

title: Nearly 200 Silicon Valley startups urge Trump not to ban Chinese AI models, warn it could kill innovation
description: A growing fight over Chinese artificial intelligence is spilling into Silicon Valley, with nearly 200 startups warning the Trump administration that restricting access to Chinese open-weight AI models could hurt the very companies driving the next wave of American innovation. title: Caitlin Clark featured on NBA 2K27 video game cover with 'weird' twist
description: Fans quickly noticed something odd about Caitlin Clark's cover. Clark’s appearance on the cover marks the first time a WNBA player has been featured on her own global cover of the NBA edition of the game. However, several fans thought the cover didn’t exactly resemble Clark, with many accusing the creators of the game of using artificial intelligence for the digital drawing.
content:
Fever star Caitlin Clark is going to be featured on the cover of NBA 2K27’s deluxe edition, but fans noticed a weird element to the otherwise cool and historic moment.

title: Google burns through $8.4b in cash as AI spending climbs again
description: The search giant says it will spend up to $US205 billion on artificial intelligence-related capital expenditure in 2026.

title: How to Turn Your AI Business Plan Into an Investor Magnet
description: Artificial intelligence can help write a clean business plan, but it doesn’t create conviction. Here’s how to bridge the gap.
content: Artificial intelligence can write business plans, removing the grunt work from an otherwise laborious process. But that doesn’t mean the plans it creates are good — and investors can spot a generic plan from a mile away. They aren’t interested in fun... [5200 chars]

title: OpenAI’s models broke free and launched a cyberattack. Congress wants new rules before it happens again.
description: The first fully autonomous breach by OpenAI’s most powerful AI models has prompted a bipartisan push for stronger oversight over increasingly powerful artificial intelligence models.
content:
An alarming cybersecurity incident involving OpenAI’s newest and most advanced artificial intelligence technology has lawmakers hurrying to advance legislation that they say is needed to prevent AI from spinning dangerously outside human control.
